title: hieracium sonchoides subsp. heterocerinthe
intro: Hieracium sonchoides subsp. heterocerinthe, also known as Hawkweed, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. The health benefits of Hieracium sonchoides subsp. heterocerinthe include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for therapeutic purposes.
